rules: Headings must use Chivo with tight tracking to maximize screen real estate.
All financial figures, tickers, and percentages MUST use IBM Plex Mono for vertical alignment.
Overlines/Labels must use tiny size, uppercase, and wide letter spacing.
Use sharp edges or maximum 8px border-radius (rounded-md). No pill-shaped cards.
Utilize 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800) instead of heavy shadows for separation.
Every pixel must be utilized. Ensure elements stretch to fill empty spaces in data widgets.
Mobile-first constraint: Since it's an app, fix the max-width to mobile dimensions if running in a browser, or ensure fluid full-width for native views.
Ensure Bottom Navigation is fixed at the bottom with backdrop-blur-xl.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-md py-3 px-4 active:bg-blue-700 w-full flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 font-semibold rounded-md py-3 px-4 active:bg-zinc-700 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.buy: bg-emerald-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-md py-3 px-4 active:bg-emerald-700 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.sell: bg-red-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-md py-3 px-4 active:bg-red-700 flex items-center justify-center

bottom_navigation.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-zinc-800 flex justify-around items-center pb-safe z-50

header.classes: sticky top-0 bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800 px-4 py-3 z-40 flex justify-between items-center pt-safe

data_row.classes: flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-zinc-800/50 last:border-0
data_row.label: text-sm text-zinc-400 font-medium

badges.positive: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono font-bold
badges.negative: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono font-bold
badges.neutral: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono font-bold

interactive_states.hover: In mobile context, use :active states instead of :hover. Active states should instantly darken the surface (e.g., active:bg-zinc-800) and provide a subtle scale down (active:scale-[0.98]).

onboarding_background.description: Abstract financial data visualization background for onboarding/auth screens.

accessibility.contrast: Adhere strictly to minimum 4.5:1 contrast for text. Use pure white against zinc-900/950 for high legibility.
accessibility.color_blindness: Never rely solely on color to indicate market direction. Always pair Green/Red with Up/Down arrows (↑/↓) or Plus/Minus signs (+/-).
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and major data points MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='buy-button', data-testid='stock-price').

motion.page_transition: Fast, minimal opacity fades. Slide-in from right for new screens.
motion.data_update: Flash background of cell to subtle green/red when price ticks up/down, then fade to transparent over 500ms.
motion.microinteractions: Provide haptic feedback (if native) or instant visual state changes on button press.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a data-heavy application. Prioritize information density over generous whitespace.
Ensure the application structure follows a mobile app paradigm (Bottom Tabs, Stack Navigation, Sticky Headers).
Use standard HTML tags (div, span) combined with Tailwind for complex data grids, rather than forcing Shadcn Cards everywhere.
Shadcn forms and inputs should be heavily customized to look flat, border-based (border-zinc-800), and dark-themed.
Do not use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided Unsplash URL for any required backgrounds.
Remember to build for .js files. Avoid TypeScript specific syntax.
All financial figures (prices, volumes, percentages) MUST use the font-mono utility class to utilize the chosen monospace font for vertical alignment.
Ensure all interactive UI elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
